title: Ban Lam Sam Kaeo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ban Lam Sam Kaeo with a Z-Score of +4.14. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ban Lam Sam Kaeo has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 64%, and the wind speed is 7.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
